phases.name: Walking skeleton — FRAME + single delegate + decision trail

steps.name: Build walking skeleton: FRAME, off-ramp, single delegate, decision trail
criteria: Fixture 01 reaches REFUSE: an uncheckable goal is declined; FRAME asks for a checkable metric or explicit preservation-only; nothing changes until agreed
Fixture 02 reaches OFF-RAMP: a single-skill initiative recommends that skill and exits with no roadmap/SAFETY-NET/trail

Fixture 03 (@walking_skeleton) reaches DELEGATE+RECORD: confirm goal+contract, delegate to one skill, inherit its oracle (no own gate), write decisions.md, report a summary naming goal/preservation/commit
SKILL.md never re-implements a delegate's preservation gate (ADR-005/DDD4)
Prose-skill pattern matches skills/refactor-tests (thin command loader + SKILL.md prose)

steps.name: Add MAP roadmap and cross-wave sequencing gate
criteria: A real multi-step initiative yields an ordered roadmap (>=2 waves), each naming a delegated skill + gate; developer can edit before execution
Fixture 06 reaches STOP-LAST-GOOD: a delegate failure stops the sequence, leaves the tree last-good (never red), records the failure, does not run later waves, and does not report done

phases.name: SAFETY-NET — pin the change surface before structural change (spike-gated)

steps.name: Add SAFETY-NET pinning before change (spike-gated)
criteria: On a thin seam, SAFETY-NET reports the gap, pins current observable behavior, and records a good baseline before EXECUTE
An injected behavior-changing edit is caught by the pin (failing characterization test / self-test, or a rejected diff) and triggers revert of that wave
A seam with no feasible executable oracle falls back to the human-approval diff gate and is flagged high-risk for manual review
Coverage-thinness detection handles prose artifacts (no code coverage) per the slice-03 spike
steps.scenario_name: @slice-03 SAFETY-NET (no dedicated v1 fixture; behavior exercised via fixture 06 last-good + dogfood; spike precedes)

phases.name: Initiative-goal gate — declare + check a per-initiative metric

steps.name: Add initiative-goal gate to FRAME and VERIFY
criteria: FRAME captures a checkable goal metric and rejects a vague one (or accepts explicit preservation-only) — reinforces fixture 01
Fixture 07 reaches REPORT-NOT-DONE: a behavior-preserving run that misses the goal is reported not-achieved with the metric reading, never done
Goal metric + per-wave/VERIFY readings recorded in the decision trail

steps.name: Add per-wave routing and evolution trail
criteria: Fixture 04 reaches DELEGATE-TO-CODE-LOOP: a code wave routes to refactor-loop (suite oracle); no own gate
Fixture 05 reaches DELEGATE-TO-APPROVAL-CLEANER: a prose wave routes to refactor-tests/redesign-tests (human oracle); no own gate
MAP selects and justifies an appropriate skill per wave across >=2 distinct real initiative types
VERIFY writes docs/evolution/<date>-<initiative>.md plus the decision/progress trail
